title: Botania: Woot Addon
description: Woot Revived Addon that add compatibility with Botania
body:
# Botania: Woot Addon

An addon for [Woot Revived](https://modrinth.com/mod/woot-revived) that add compatibility with [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania).

This addon adds compatibility with the Guardian of Gaia from Botania.

It is mandatory to kill the hard variant of the Guardian of Gaia to program the Mob Shard. That will let you get the Fake Spawner of it.

Once you have your Fake Spawner, you'll need the netherite tier of the Woot Factory for it to be valid. And then for each simulation you will need to import 1 Gaia Spirit Ingot from Botania.

It also optionally adds compatibility with the Guardian of Gaia III from [ExtraBotany](https://modrinth.com/mod/extrabotany). For this one you'll also need a Netherite tier factory but this time you will need to import 1 Challenge Ticket to simulate it.
